description_long: This is a compact white van with a boxy shape, featuring a slightly rounded front and rear. The van has a utilitarian design, with visible panel seams and a set of small wheels. On the roof, there is a large, dark roof rack loaded with various items covered by tarps or blankets, suggesting it is used for transporting goods or personal belongings. The windows are tinted or dark, with two on the front, one on each side, and a large rear window. The van's exterior shows signs of wear, including dirt and minor scuffs, indicating regular use in urban environments.
description: A compact, white van with a loaded roof rack and dark-tinted windows, showing signs of urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, roof rack contents, and two visible wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large rear window, taillights, and the full extent of the roof rack.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, with the roof rack and side door seams visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the windshield, headlights, and the front portion of the roof rack.
attribute_car_manufacturer: likely Chinese or East Asian manufacturer
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
